articles.title: Kyiv monastery: 'Not inconceivable that is was deliberately targeted'
articles.description: The Kyiv Pechersk Lavra monastery, a symbol of Ukrainian spiritual and cultural history, caught fire amid heavy Russian attacks on Ukraine overnight. While is "not inconceivable that is was deliberately targeted", there did not appear to have been a direct missile hit on the buidling, reports France 24's Gulliver Cragg from the Ukrainian capital.

articles.title: 11 Skydivers, One Pilot Dead After Missouri Plane Crashes Moments After Takeoff
articles.description: Eleven skydivers and one pilot were killed Sunday in a Missouri plane crash described as a "mass casualty" event. The tragedy unfolded just moments after takeoff from Butler Memorial Airport, a city located about 65 miles south of Kansas City. The post 11 Skydivers, One Pilot Dead After Missouri Plane Crashes Moments After Takeoff appeared first on Breitbart .

articles.title: Aurora drowning incident: NBI subpoenas Tab Baldwin, Ateneo players
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines – NBI Director Melvin Matibag said Monday that the National Bureau of Investigation has officially issued asubpoena to Ateneo men’s basketball head coach Tab Baldwin, as well as multiple school officials and team athletes. This follows the tragic drowning of Blue Eagles players Rene Clert Baterbonia and Divine Adili on June 8 during a team-building activity in Dipaculao, Aurora. READ: Remulla: Ateneo athletics chief appears before CIDG, Baldwin no-show “Tomorrow, we will subpoena Coach Tab Baldwin, the Ateneo players, and some university officials,” Matibag said in a media roundtable. “Once they come here we will ask questions. They will [...]... Keep on reading: Aurora drowning incident: NBI subpoenas Tab Baldwin, Ateneo players

articles.title: Kentucky Sen. Mitch McConnell hospitalized, receiving ‘excellent care' - Sun, 14 Jun 2026 PST
articles.description: Longtime Kentucky Sen. Mitch McConnell was hospitalized Sunday morning, according to his spokesperson. McConnell’s spokesperson, Stephanie Penn, said in a brief statement the senator was hospitalized and was receiving “excellent care.” Penn did not disclose why or where McConnell, 84, was hospitalized. His condition was not available Sunday afternoon.
